description_long: This coatrack features a tall, rectangular wooden panel with a smooth, natural wood grain finish. It has two round, dark-colored knobs protruding from either side, serving as hooks for hanging coats or accessories. The front face is subtly detailed with horizontal grooves, adding a touch of visual interest without being overly ornate. The knobs are symmetrically placed at about one-third from the top, making them easily accessible. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible base or additional storage features. Its compact and vertical form makes it suitable for placement in entryways, hallways, or offices.
description: A tall, rectangular wooden coatrack with two dark round knobs and subtle horizontal grooves, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the wooden panel and both round knobs extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full wooden face, two horizontal grooves, and a single visible knob on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and both knobs extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear or alternate front view, similar to view 1 but with the knob on the left side.
